title: K8s Resource Quota Analyzer
description:
Input: two sections separated by `---`.

**Section 1:** `kubectl top pods` output — `pod_name cpu_millicores memory_mib` per line (skip header).
**Section 2:** resource limits — `pod_name cpu_limit_millicores memory_limit_mib` per line (skip header).

Find pods where **CPU usage > 80%** of limit OR **memory usage > 80%** of limit.

Return `pod_name resource usage/limit` per finding, sorted by pod_name then by resource (cpu before memory). Return empty string if all pods are within limits.
constraints: If a pod exceeds both, output two lines for that pod
Sort by pod_name alphabetically, then cpu before memory

examples.input:
NAME CPU MEMORY
api-pod 850 512
db-pod 100 220
---
NAME CPU_LIMIT MEMORY_LIMIT
api-pod 1000 640
db-pod 200 256
examples.explanation: api-pod CPU 85%>80% flagged. db-pod memory 86%>80% flagged.

test_cases.description: Two pods over limit in different resources
test_cases.input:
NAME CPU MEMORY
api-pod 850 512
db-pod 100 220
---
NAME CPU_LIMIT MEMORY_LIMIT
api-pod 1000 640
db-pod 200 256

NAME CPU MEMORY
pod-a 100 128
---
NAME CPU_LIMIT MEMORY_LIMIT
pod-a 1000 512

NAME CPU MEMORY
worker 450 900
cache 50 100
---
NAME CPU_LIMIT MEMORY_LIMIT
worker 500 1000
cache 200 512
